resourceTemplates.name: linkedin-ads-search
resourceTemplates.title: Search LinkedIn ads
resourceTemplates.description: Searches the LinkedIn Ad Library. Supports optional filters for `company`, `keyword`, `companyId`, comma-separated `countries`, `startDate`, `endDate`, and pagination with `paginationToken`.

resourceTemplates.name: linkedin-ad-detail
resourceTemplates.title: Get LinkedIn ad details
resourceTemplates.description: Returns detailed LinkedIn Ad Library data for a specific ad by required public ad `url`.
